title: trymalium litorale
intro: Trymalium litorale, also known as Pittosporum litorale, is a species of flowering plant in the family Pittosporaceae, native to Australia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are believed to help with wound healing and the treatment of infections. The health benefits of Trymalium litorale include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antimicrobial activity, making it a promising natural remedy for various health conditions. Herbal preparations of Trymalium litorale can be made by infusing the leaves in hot water or using them in a topical cream, allowing for its medicinal properties to be harnessed and utilized.
